questions.text: What's your ideal temperature range when choosing a city? Are you someone who tolerates any heat as long as there's A/C, or do you have a hard upper limit where the heat starts affecting your mood or productivity?

When you're going out for drinks in Mexico — say Friday after volleyball — what's your default? Do you stick to beer, cocktails, or does it depend on the venue? Any go-to Mexican beers or cocktails you always order?

How's your Spanish coming along? Do you feel comfortable handling daily life (ordering food, Negotiating prices, doctor visits) in Spanish, or are there specific situations where you still need English or a translator?

What podcasts do you regularly listen to — if any? Are you into tech/AI podcasts, true crime, storytelling, or something else entirely? Do you mainly listen during commutes, workouts, or while doing chores?

Beyond volleyball, what other hobbies or creative outlets do you enjoy? Things like gaming, photography, music, woodworking, coding side projects — anything you do to unwind that isn't fitness or media consumption?
